[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A person takes a mirror selfie indoors, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt and loose light-wash jeans with accessories.

Main Subject: The main focus is a person shown from head to lower legs, facing a mirror and holding a black smartphone to cover their face; their head is slightly tilted downward as they look toward the phone screen.

Setting: The scene is indoors in a room with light-colored painted walls and wood plank flooring. In the background, there is an open doorway or recessed opening, a light gray cushioned bench or low seating area near the right side, and scattered small items on the floor behind the person. Lighting is even and bright, suggesting indoor ambient light.

Visual Details: The person has medium-length, dark hair with a messy, tousled shape. They wear a white long-sleeve shirt with a layered look, along with a silver necklace featuring a small cross-shaped pendant and another thin chain. A watch with a dark face is visible on their wrist, and they also wear multiple bracelets and a ring. Their jeans are loose, light-wash, and slightly wrinkled, with a black belt. They hold the phone with one hand; the other hand rests near the waistband. A green backpack strap runs over one shoulder. On the lower legs, black footwear is visible; the shoes appear slightly scuffed or darkened at the toe area. The camera angle is a straight-on mirror view with the person centered in the frame, and the smartphone display area is visible as a black rectangle.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a person taking a mirror selfie indoors, dressed in casual white and denim clothing. The background includes a light gray bench or low seat and a doorway/opening, with wood flooring throughout.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No readable text is visible in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- [No text detected / no readable text present]

# Notes

- The image appears to be a mirror selfie with no visible UI, captions, watermarks, or other readable text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with shaggy, dark brown hair takes a mirror selfie in a well-lit, modern room. They are wearing a long-sleeved white t-shirt, loose-fitting light-wash denim jeans with a chain attached to the belt loop, a black belt with a silver buckle, and dark chunky shoes. Several silver necklaces with cross pendants and multiple silver bracelets adorn their wrists and neck. Their phone, held up to take the photo, has a black case covered in silver studs. The background shows a wooden floor, a white wall with some electrical outlets, and a grey ottoman with wooden legs. The lighting is bright and even, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and stylish, with a hint of an edgy aesthetic.
